snippet.title: The End of Oak Street | Official Teaser Trailer
snippet.description:
“Our house, our neighborhood, our whole street has moved." The End of Oak Street only in theaters and IMAX August 14. #EndofOakStreet #FilmedforIMAX

After a mysterious cosmic event rips Oak Street from suburbia and transports their neighborhood to someplace unknown, the Platt family soon discovers that their very survival depends on them sticking together as they navigate their now unrecognizable surroundings.

Starring Anne Hathaway and Ewan McGregor, THE END OF OAK STREET also stars Maisy Stella and Christian Convery. The film is written and directed by David Robert Mitchell and produced by J.J. Abrams, Hannah Minghella, Jon Cohen, David Robert Mitchell, Matt Jackson and Tommy Harper. The executive producers are Chris Bender, Jake Weiner, Joanne Lee and Leeann Stonebreaker.

Mitchell’s team behind the camera includes director of photography Michael Gioulakis, production designer Maya Shimoguchi, editor John Axelrad, composer Michael Giacchino and costume designer Erin Benach. 
Warner Bros. Pictures Presents A Bad Robot Production, A Jackson Pictures Production, A David Robert Mitchell Film: THE END OF OAK STREET. The film will be distributed worldwide by Warner Bros. Pictures, only in theaters and IMAX in North America on August 14, 2026, and internationally beginning 12 August 2026.

snippet.title: CG5 - Crumbled Crown (CookieRun: Kingdom Song)
snippet.description:
Download CookieRun: Kingdom here ▶ https://bit.ly/CG5Cookie
Thank you to Devsisters for sponsoring this video.
Stream “Crumbled Crown” ▶ https://cg5.lnk.to/CrumbledCrown

Song by CG5
Music Production by @CG5 & @SilvaHound
Guitars by Josh Locke
Visuals by Ichiro, Moura, Arty & DeanNiik
With original art by bannanitta7u7 (https://x.com/bannanitta7u7)

LYRICS: 

Sweet were the skies, 
Of flour-white dawns,
When the ovens of fate burned.
The just and the cruel sang their own songs,
Fractured the fragile world they’d learn. 

Age-old blades of caramel light,
And shields of candied flame.
How does a hero stand upright,
And bind for life the dark one’s name?

One final word split the air,
When the final mark caught fire.
Scattered like crumbs,
Cursed to beware.
Each to wander, but climb no higher.

Earthbread slept in powdered ash,
Its banners torn and drowned.
How does a kingdom stand upright,
With such a silent, broken crown?

So rise, crumbled crown.
Oh rise, crumbled crown.
From the oven to the open plain,
Light the shadows,
On friendship’s flame.
HEY!

Soul jam burned with freedom’s light,
Such wonder in her eyes.
Said,
“I bear the sin, I’ll face the cost,
For every soul my hands have lost.”

So rise, crumbled crown.
Oh rise, crumbled crown.
From the oven to the open plain,
Light the shadows,
On friendship’s flame.

So rise, crumbled crown.
Oh rise, crumbled crown.
From the oven to the open plain,
Light the shadows,
On friendship’s flame.
HEY!

Twitter: https://twitter.com/Foltynnn

What is Roblox? ROBLOX is an online virtual playground and workshop, where kids of all ages can safely interact, create, have fun, and learn. It’s unique in that practically everything on ROBLOX is designed and constructed by members of the community. ROBLOX is designed for 13 to 18 year olds, but it is open to people of all ages. Each player starts by choosing an avatar and giving it an identity. They can then explore ROBLOX — interacting with others by chatting, playing games, or collaborating on creative projects. Each player is also given their own piece of undeveloped real estate along with a virtual toolbox with which to design and build anything — be it a navigable skyscraper, a working helicopter, a giant pinball machine, a multiplayer “Capture the Flag” game or some other, yet-to-be-dreamed-up creation. There is no cost for this first plot of virtual land. By participating and by building cool stuff, ROBLOX members can earn specialty badges as well as ROBLOX dollars (“Robux”). In turn, they can shop the online catalog to purchase avatar clothing and accessories as well as premium building materials, interactive components, and working mechanisms.

It’s unique in that practically everything on ROBLOX is designed and constructed by members of the community. ROBLOX is designed for 13 to 18 year olds, but it is open to people of all ages. Each player starts by choosing an avatar and giving it an identity. They can then explore ROBLOX — interacting with others by chatting, playing games, or collaborating on creative projects. Each player is also given their own piece of undeveloped real estate along with a virtual toolbox with which to design and build anything — be it a navigable skyscraper, a working helicopter, a giant pinball machine, a multiplayer “Capture the Flag” game or some other, yet-to-be-dreamed-up creation. There is no cost for this first plot of virtual land. By participating and by building cool stuff, ROBLOX members can earn specialty badges as well as ROBLOX dollars (“Robux”). snippet.title: FATAL FURY: CotW × FIST OF THE NORTH STAR: HOKUTO NO KEN｜KENSHIRO｜Teaser Trailer
snippet.description:
From North Star to South Town―
Kenshiro is coming to FATAL FURY: City of the Wolves!
Fists meet Fury in June 2026. 👊⚡

--------------------------------------------------------------

Kenshiro from Fist of the North Star explodes into City of the Wolves Season 2!

The legendary fighter who survived the end of the century descends on South Town in FATAL FURY: City of the Wolves. How will Kenshiro, with his commanding presence, blend in with the game's mechanics and mayhem? Stay tuned for more developments!

What is Fist of the North Star?
Fist of the North Star (Hokuto no Ken) is a Japanese manga franchise created by Buronson and illustrated by Tetsuo Hara. It centers on Kenshiro, sole successor to the ancient Hokuto Shinken martial art, and his fight against evil in a post-apocalyptic world ravaged by nuclear war. Fist of the North Star was serialized in Weekly Shonen Jump magazine in 1983 and has enthralled fans worldwide ever since with its profound universe, unforgettable characterization, and memorable lines.

A brand-new anime iteration—FIST OF THE NORTH STAR—will air on TOKYO MX and BS11 from April 10, 2026 (1 AM JST), with new staff, cast members, and the latest video technologies ushering the franchise into the modern era. Tune in as fearsome warriors battle it out at the end of the century and forge a fresh new legend this year!

--------------------------------------------------------------

Legends unleashed! The Legend Edition bundles the base game with Season Passes 1 and 2—a perfect way to enjoy the franchise's appeal for newcomers and veterans alike!

FATAL FURY: City of the Wolves - Season Pass 2 
- Price: $19.99 / €19.99
- Selling Format: Digital

Contents:
- DLC character: Kim Jae Hoon (Available now)
- DLC character: Nightmare Geese (Available now)
- DLC character: Blue Mary (Available now)
- DLC character: Wolfgang Krauser (April 2026)
- DLC character: ??? (May 2026)
- DLC character: Kenshiro (June 2026)

FATAL FURY: City of the Wolves Legend Edition (Season Pass 1 + 2)
- Price: $49.99 / €49.99
- Selling Format: Digital

Contents:
- Base game
- Season Pass 1 (Andy Bogard / Ken / Joe Higashi / Chun-Li / Mr. Big)
- Season Pass 2 (Kim Jae Hoon / Nightmare Geese / Blue Mary / Wolfgang Krauser / ??? / Kenshiro)

snippet.description:
‘The Boys of Dungeon Lane’ coming May 29th

Credits:
Animation by Trunk
Produced by Ben Chappell, MPL

Lyrics:
Looking back at white and black
Reminders of my past
Smoky bars and cheap guitars
But nothing built to last

Nothing ever stays
Nothing comes to mind
No one can erase
The days we left behind

See the boys of Dungeon Lane
Along the Mersey shore
Some of them will feel the pain
But some were meant for more

And nothing stays the same
No one needs to cry
Nothing can reclaim
The days we left behind

We met at Forthlin Road
And wrote a secret code
To never be spoken
I stand by what I said
The promise that I made
Will never be broken

Nothing ever stays
Nothing comes to mind
And no one can erase
The days we left behind

In the skies the skylarks rise
Above the sounds of war
Since that day I knew they’d stay
With me for evermore

’Cause nothing stays the same
And no one needs to cry
And no one is to blame
For the days we left behind

The days we left behind

snippet.title: The Harry Potter Trailer Has One Big Problem
snippet.description:
HBO promised us a 100% faithful adaptation of Harry Potter, but after going through the brand new HBO Max teaser trailer frame-by-frame, it's pretty clear they are already pulling our bloody legs. Today on Aussie Explains, we are breaking down the entire new Harry Potter and the Philosopher's Stone trailer to show you exactly what they changed. From the absolute Yassification of Severus Snape to Hagrid making completely un-book-accurate snow angels like a giant toddler, we cover all the lies HBO is trying to feed us. We also talk about the dodgy three-dollar stock music replacing the iconic John Williams score, the suspiciously clean London Underground, and why putting the billionaire orphan's Nimbus 2000 on the school's tab is trickle-down economics at its finest.

Is this new Harry Potter TV series going to be a masterpiece, or is it just another streaming cash grab destined to be split into three parts like Stranger Things? Grab a cold one and let's find out.

#HarryPotter #HarryPotterHBO #HBOMax #HarryPotterTrailer #HarryPotterSeries #AussieExplains #HarryPotterReaction #HarryPotterAndThePhilosophersStone #TrailerBreakdown #Snape #Hagrid
